name: claude-history
description: Queryable access to Claude Code session history — search messages, browse sessions, trace file operations, git operations, token usage, and run arbitrary SQL against the local session database.

db_path.title: Database Path
db_path.description: Path to the claude-history SQLite database

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search message content AND attachment textual content (mcp_instructions_delta added blocks, skill_listing content, edited_text_file snippets, nested_memory content) using FTS5. Each result carries a `source` discriminator: `{kind: "message"}` or `{kind: "attachment", subtype: "<inner_type>"}`. Supports AND, OR, NOT, "phrase match", and prefix* syntax. Results ranked by bm25 relevance.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List sessions with optional project, date, and limit filters.

tools.name: query_messages
tools.description: Query messages with filters for session, type, model, tool, date range, and plan-content presence. has_plan=true narrows to plan-bearing messages (migration 010 plan_content column); has_plan=false narrows to messages without plan_content; omit for no filter.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files touched by Claude Code across sessions. Filters: session_id, path (substring match), project (substring match on project_path via sessions table). Use project to scope results to one project when the same filename appears in many.

tools.name: file_history
tools.description: Show chronological file operations (read, write, edit) on a file. Path is substring matched — partial paths like 'main.rs' work. Use project to scope to a specific project. Returns operations with content, timestamps, and message UUIDs.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show git operations (commit, push, checkout, etc.) extracted from Bash tool calls.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Show token usage, tool frequency, and model breakdown statistics.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT query against the claude-history database. Use list_queries or the schema reference for table/column info.

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Execute a named canned query with parameter binding. Use list_queries to discover available queries.

tools.name: list_queries
tools.description: List all available canned queries. Each query has a name, description, SQL template, and parameter definitions.

tools.name: list_bookmarks
tools.description: List bookmarks from ClaudeHistoryBrowser, sorted by creation date (newest first). Bookmarks are stored in a separate database and survive session history rebuilds.

tools.name: search_bookmarks
tools.description: Search bookmarks by label or tag text (substring match). Bookmarks are stored in a separate database and survive session history rebuilds.

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.description: List attachment rows from the attachments table (migration 008). Filters: project (substring match against sessions.project_path), inner_type (exact match on the AttachmentBody discriminator e.g. hook_success, skill_listing, mcp_instructions_delta), since (ISO-8601 timestamp lower bound), limit (default 50). Returns attachment envelope rows ordered by timestamp DESC; body_json is included as raw JSON text.

tools.name: get_hook_executions
tools.description: List rows from the hook_executions table (migration 008) — flat per-hook records produced by decomposing hook_success and hook_permission_decision attachments. Filters: tool_use_id (exact match, joins to tool_executions), hook_event (e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, Stop), exit_code (exact match), limit (default 50). Returns rows ordered by id DESC.

tools.name: get_bookmark
tools.description: Retrieve a single bookmark by its ID or by assistant message UUID. At least one of 'id' or 'assistant_uuid' must be provided.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List plan-mode markdown documents extracted from user.planContent (migration 010). Filters: project (substring match against sessions.project_path), since (ISO-8601 timestamp lower bound on messages.timestamp), limit (default 50). Returns rows ordered by timestamp DESC with session_id, message_uuid, project_path, timestamp, plan_content_length (char count of full markdown), and plan_content_preview (first ~200 chars). Call get_plan with a session_id to fetch the full plan body.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Fetch full plan-mode markdown bodies for every plan-bearing message in a session. A session can hold multiple plans across distinct user turns; rows are returned in chronological order (timestamp ASC). Returns an empty array when the session has no plan_content rows or does not exist. Each row carries session_id, message_uuid, project_path, timestamp, and the full plan_content text (no length cap).
